title: Property Foreclosure Redemption Timelines and Community Outreach for Land Bank Transfers
summary: Councilor Jones-Rowser clarifies property foreclosure redemption rights: vacant lots have 5-6 month window, structures 8-10 months, even after council action. NBD staff and councilors conduct extensive community outreach to property owners in foreclosure. Item 30 withdrawn pending internal discussion on long-term land use plans.
